transcript: A quiet day at home mostly, pottered about and did some ironing. In the evening I watched a wonderful programme about Patagonia, all about the wildlife. The condors were extraordinary, these enormous birds just riding the thermals for hours. Made me think about the red kite I saw the other week. I would love to travel again, even somewhere in Britain I have never been. Had a cup of chamomile and went to bed feeling quite content.
